assertions.title: Logprobs are computed in float32 regardless of model dtype

steps.action: Code inspection: Search for logSoftmax, bfloat16 upcast patterns in Swift sources
steps.expected: All logprob computation paths upcast bfloat16 logits to float32 before logSoftmax
steps.observed: Found 4 separate code paths, all with identical bfloat16→float32 upcast guard before logSoftmax

steps.action: Verify model config dtype is bfloat16
steps.expected: Model config shows bfloat16 dtype with quantization

steps.action: Send chat completions request with logprobs=true, top_logprobs=5
steps.expected: All logprob values are negative, finite (not NaN, not -Inf, not +Inf)
steps.observed: 6 token positions with 36 total logprob values checked: 0 NaN, 0 Inf, 0 positive values

steps.action: Softmax consistency check: sum(exp(top_logprobs)) at each position

LogprobsCollector_capture.code: var lp = logits; if lp.dtype == .bfloat16 { lp = lp.asType(.float32) }; let logProbs = logSoftmax(lp)

TokenIterator_sample.code: if logits.dtype == .bfloat16 { logits = logits.asType(.float32) }; var logprobs = logSoftmax(logits)

Evaluate_prepare_prompt_logprobs.code: if logits.dtype == .bfloat16 { logits = logits.asType(.float32) }; let logProbs = logSoftmax(logits)

Engine_loglikelihoodFastPath.code: if logits.dtype == .bfloat16 { logits = logits.asType(.float32) }; let logProbs = logSoftmax(logits)

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-NUM-001 PASSED. Code inspection confirms all 4 logprob computation paths upcast bfloat16 logits to float32 before logSoftmax. Model is confirmed bfloat16+4bit quantized. Live API test shows 36 logprob values, all finite and non-positive, with softmax sums consistently ≤1.0.
